summary: Completed P2/P3 features testing for Compass AI: Scheduled Assessments CRUD, Shareable Report Links, Bulk Import CSV, HelpTooltip component, and PWA service worker. Fixed a datetime handling bug in the shared report endpoint. All 19 backend tests passed. Frontend features working correctly.

minor.issue: Frontend shows 'Failed to create share link' error intermittently despite API working correctly. May be auth token timing issue.

integration_issues.flow: Share link creation from Assessment Result page
integration_issues.issue: Intermittent 'Failed to create share link' error when clicking Create Share Link button. Backend API works correctly via curl. Likely token/session timing issue.

issues: Some schedules show 'Unknown' for client/system names when the referenced entities were deleted. Consider adding cascade delete or showing 'Deleted' label instead.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/scheduled-assessments returns list
Backend: POST /api/scheduled-assessments creates schedule with next_due date
Backend: DELETE /api/scheduled-assessments/{id} removes schedule
Backend: GET /api/scheduled-assessments/due returns due items
Backend: Scheduled assessments requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/shareable-reports creates share token and URL
Backend: GET /api/shared/{token} returns report, assessment, client, system data
Backend: Invalid share token returns 404
Backend: GET /api/shareable-reports lists user's reports
Backend: Shareable reports requires authentication
Backend: POST /api/bulk/import-clients endpoint exists and accepts CSV
Backend: POST /api/bulk/import-systems endpoint exists and accepts CSV
Backend: Bulk import requires authentication
Backend: GET /api/stats/dashboard returns risk_distribution for HelpTooltip context
Frontend: HelpTooltip displays on Risk Distribution card with correct content
Frontend: Scheduled Assessments page loads with list, New Schedule button, delete functionality
Frontend: Create Schedule dialog has Client, AI System, Frequency, Notification Email fields
Frontend: Bulk Import page has Clients/AI Systems tabs, CSV drop zone, Download Template button, Required Columns display
Frontend: Assessment Result page has Share button that opens Share Assessment Report dialog
Frontend: Share dialog has Link Expiry dropdown and Create Share Link button
Frontend: Shared Report page (/shared/{token}) displays governance score, risk tier, category maturity, critical flags
Frontend: PWA service worker (sw.js) is accessible and contains caching strategies
action_items: Investigate intermittent 'Failed to create share link' error in frontend - may be auth token race condition
Consider adding cascade delete for scheduled assessments when client/system is deleted, or showing 'Deleted' instead of 'Unknown'
updated_files: /app/backend/server.py - Fixed datetime handling in get_shared_report endpoint
/app/backend/tests/test_p2_p3_features.py - Created comprehensive test suite for P2/P3 features

success_rate.frontend: 95% (All features working, minor share link creation intermittent issue)

seed_data_creation: Test schedules and shareable reports created during testing (cleaned up)
context_for_next_testing_agent: P2/P3 features fully tested: (1) Scheduled Assessments CRUD working via /scheduled-assessments page with sidebar navigation under ADMIN section. (2) Shareable Reports working - Share button on Assessment Result page, shared report view at /shared/{token}. (3) Bulk Import page at /bulk-import with Clients/AI Systems tabs and CSV upload. (4) HelpTooltip showing on Dashboard Risk Distribution card. (5) PWA service worker sw.js accessible with proper caching strategies. Fixed bug: datetime handling in shared report endpoint for expiry checking.

rca_of_the_issue.bug_fixed: Shared report endpoint (GET /api/shared/{token}) was failing with TypeError when checking expiry date
rca_of_the_issue.root_cause: The code expected expires_at to be a string but it was stored as a datetime object in MongoDB. Also, offset-naive vs offset-aware datetime comparison issue.
rca_of_the_issue.fix_applied: Added type checking for expires_at field and timezone awareness handling in server.py lines 2760-2768
